title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details
scenario: Tapping the gray geo icon for an offline/disconnected device in Find My Device shows a window with the last known address, device name, status, last connection date, and battery percentage.
steps: Ensure a device is disconnected or out of range in Find My Device.
Tap the gray geo icon for that device.
expected: A new window is displayed showing: the address of the last known location (street & city), device name and status, date of last connection, and last known battery percentage.
